concerns.location: spec.md:FR-001 through FR-010, SC-001 through SC-006
concerns.text: Terminology inconsistency: User stories are titled 'User Story 1', 'User Story 2', 'User Story 3' in section headers, but all FRs and SCs reference them as 'US-1', 'US-2', 'US-3'. Cross-references should use consistent naming convention throughout (either 'User Story X' or 'US-X').

Acceptance Scenario 3 specifies '≥ 95% of bugs (≥ 47 bugs)' which conflicts with the Success Criteria guidance stating 'Planning docs state *what* will be measured and defer specific empirical values to the implementation/research phase'. Either remove specific numbers from acceptance criteria or add explicit note that these are feasibility targets, not hard requirements.
